name: Scryfall API docs
notes: No-auth REST and bulk data API; primary card/oracle/ruling/image metadata source.

name: Scryfall bulk-data endpoint
notes: Live probe captured oracle/default/all-card bulk download URIs and sizes.

name: MTGJSON home
notes: Normalized Magic JSON datasets; good for set/product/deck/identifier joins.

name: MTGJSON Meta
notes: Live probe returned version 5.3.0+20260524.

name: magicthegathering.io docs
notes: Older REST API; useful as reference but weaker than Scryfall/MTGJSON for new work.

name: 17Lands public datasets
notes: Use public dumps; avoid scraping unstable UI endpoints.

name: 17Lands usage guidelines
notes: Guidelines distinguish public datasets from curated site data and discourage automated API scraping.

name: Commander Spellbook API root
notes: Root exposes variants/cards/features/find-my-combos endpoints.

name: Commander Spellbook OpenAPI schema
notes: OpenAPI 3.0.3 schema for combo database engine.

name: Argentum Engine
notes: Gym/gym-server/gym-trainer tests pass locally under JDK 21; MIT license in repo.

name: mage-bench
notes: XMage-based LLM benchmark; Python smoke and Maven compile pass; CPU game reached GAME_OVER but needed manual interrupt for export lifecycle.

name: XMage
notes: MIT Java full rules engine; mage-bench uses a fork/bridge on top.

name: Forge
notes: Mature GPL Java engine/game with AI and broad card support.

name: Cockatrice
notes: Open-source multiplayer tabletop card client; useful for playtest UX but not rules-enforced benchmark core.

name: Draftmancer
notes: Open-source TypeScript draft/sealed simulator; useful for draft UI/task generation.

name: CubeCobra
notes: Open-source cube management app; good cube/decklist product reference.

name: Magarena
notes: Older Java AI/rules project; stale relative to active engines.

name: Wagic
notes: Open-source C++ MTG-like engine with active recent pushes.

name: MTG-Causal-RL paper
notes: Gymnasium MTG benchmark with partial observations, masked action space, standard archetypes, causal variables.

name: mage-bench site
notes: Public LLM-vs-MTG benchmark built around XMage bridge.

name: BALROG
notes: LLM/VLM long-horizon game benchmark reference.

name: GameWorld
notes: Game-agent benchmark with state-verifiable scoring.

name: VideoGameBench
notes: VLM game benchmark; useful latency/pause-mode precedent.

name: gym-locm
notes: Gymnasium environment for Legends of Code and Magic; relevant CCG benchmark precedent.

name: UrzaGPT paper
notes: LoRA-tuned LLM for real-time MTG draft decisions from annotated draft logs.

name: ManaBench
notes: Deck-completion benchmark: choose the 60th card from six options for a tournament deck.
